p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0) { fan_out[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = Pair.new[T1, T2](x0(x2), x1(x2)) }[Z, X, Y](f, identity_fn[Z -> Y](g), z)

goal: lhs.first = compose[A, C, E](f, g, p.first)

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T2 -> T0, x1: T3 -> T1, x2: Pair[T2, T3]) { pair_map[T2, T3, T0, T1](x0, x1, x2).first = x0(x2.first) }[E, F, A, B](compose[A, C, E](f, g), compose[B, D, F](h, i), p)

goal: compose[A, C, E](f, g, p.first) = f(g(p.first))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Pair[T0, T2], x1: T2 -> T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.first, x1(x0.second)) = pair_map_second[T0, T2, T1](x1, x0) }[A, D, B](p, compose[B, C, D](f, g))

goal: compose[B, C, D](f, g, p.second) = f(g(p.second))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[B, C, D](f, g, p.second)

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Pair[T0, T2], x1: T2 -> T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0.first, x1(x0.second)) = pair_map_second[T0, T2, T1](x1, x0) }[A, D, B](p, compose[B, C, D](f, g))

goal: curry[T, U, V](uncurry[T, U, V](f), x, y) = uncurry[T, U, V](f, Pair.new(x, y))

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Pair[T0, T1] -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { curry[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(Pair.new[T0, T1](x1, x2)) }[T, U, V](uncurry[T, U, V](f), x, y)

goal: uncurry[T, U, V](f, Pair.new(x, y)) = f(x, y)

p.c: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: Pair[T0, T1]) { x0(x1.first, x1.second) = uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[T, U, V](f, Pair.new(x, y))

exists(k0: T) { f(k0) != curry[T, U, V](uncurry[T, U, V](f), k0) }
let w0: T satisfy { f(w0) != curry[T, U, V](uncurry[T, U, V](f), w0) }
exists(k0: U) { f(w0, k0) != curry[T, U, V](uncurry[T, U, V](f), w0, k0) }
let w1: U satisfy { f(w0, w1) != curry[T, U, V](uncurry[T, U, V](f), w0, w1) }
function(x0: T, x1: U) { uncurry[T, U, V](f, Pair.new(x0, x1)) = f(x0, x1) }(w0, w1)

goal: uncurry[T, U, V](curry[T, U, V](f), p) = curry[T, U, V](f, p.first, p.second)

goal: curry[T, U, V](f, p.first, p.second) = f(Pair.new(p.first, p.second))
